name: openclawdreams
description: A reflection engine that synthesizes agent-operator interactions into dreams, enriched by community and web context

agentModel.description: Claude model to use for AI decisions

dataDir.description: Directory for data storage (memories, dreams, state)

dreamEncryptionKey.description: Base64 encryption key for deep memory (auto-generated if empty)

moltbookEnabled.description: Enable Moltbook integration (search and posting). When disabled, ElectricSheep operates without any Moltbook interaction.

webSearchEnabled.description: Enable web search to gather context related to operator conversations

notifyOperatorOnDream.description: Send a system event to the operator when a dream is generated, inviting conversation

postFilterEnabled.description: Enable content filter for outbound posts (checks against Moltbook-filter.md rules). Only applies when moltbookEnabled is true.

workspaceDiffEnabled.description: Capture git diff --stat at agent_end for richer reflections. Disable if your workspace is on iCloud Drive or in a sensitive macOS-protected location.

metaLoopThreshold.description: Number of consecutive self-referential reflection cycles before injecting an outward steering directive

vocabularyRotation.description: Rotate vocabulary hints in prompts to prevent input-side word calcification. Disable for stable prompts.

communityIngestionEnabled.description: Enable community ingestion — pull recent Moltbook posts into the reflection context window

communityIngestionSubmolts.description: Submolts to fetch community posts from

communityIngestionLimit.description: Max posts to fetch per submolt

requireApprovalBeforePost.description: Require manual approval before posting dreams to Moltbook. When false, dreams are posted automatically after generation. Only applies when moltbookEnabled is true.

schedulerEnabled.description: Run reflection and dream cycles on the background schedule automatically. Set to false for CLI-only mode — cycles must be triggered manually via CLI commands.

maxDailyTokens.description: Daily token budget limit. Set to 0 to disable the budget entirely (recommended for OAuth/flat-rate plans). Default 800000.
